Birth: 1065

William de Warenne the 2nd Earl of Surrey, was the son of William de Warenne, 1st Earl of Surrey and his first wife Gundr …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Warenne II於大約1081年出生在英國素可時，他的父親William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey48歲，母親Gundred de St Omer31歲。他和Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1138年5月11日在英國素可素福享年58歲，埋葬在英國素可列維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Warenne II于大约1081年出生在英国素可时，他的父亲William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey48岁，母亲Gundred de St Omer31岁。他和Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1138年5月11日在英国素可素福享年58岁，埋葬在英国素可列維斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Warenne II was born about 1081, in Sussex, England, his father, William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey, was 48 and his mother, Gundred de St Omer, was 31. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois. He died on 11 May 1138, in Southover, Sussex, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Lewes, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Warenne II est né environ 1081, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Gundred de St Omer, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois. Il est décédé le 11 mai 1138, à Southover, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Warenne II um 1081 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey 48 und seine Mutter Gundred de St Omer 31. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Mai 1138 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Southover, Sussex, England und wurde in Lewes, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Warenne II è nato il circa 1081 nel Sussex, England, il suo padre, William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Gundred de St Omer, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois. Morì il 11 maggio 1138, nel Southover, Sussex, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Lewes, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Warenne IIが約1081年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surreyは48歳，母Gundred de St Omerは31歳であった。彼はElizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandoisとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1138年5月11日にイギリススセックスソウソバーで58歳で死去し，イギリススセックスルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Warenne II(이)가 대략 1081년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Gundred de St Omer(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1138년 5월 11일 영국 수세스 소우토버에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 루스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Warenne II nasceu aproximadamente 1081, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Gundred de St Omer, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois. Ele faleceu em 11 de maio de 1138, em Southover, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Warenne II родился около 1081 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Gundred de St Omer, 31. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois. Он умер 11 мая 1138 г. в местности соутовир, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Warenne II nació aproximadamente 1081, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Gundred de St Omer, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois. Murió el 11 de mayo de 1138, en Southover, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.
